channel.title: Dart on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Dart on Arrans github.io

item.title: wgh136/PicaComic
item.description: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.

item.title: dart-lang/sdk
item.description: The Dart SDK, including the VM, dart2js, core libraries, and more.

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: flutter/gallery
item.description: Flutter Gallery was a resource to help developers evaluate and use Flutter

item.title: thunder-app/thunder
item.description: Thunder - An open-source cross-platform Lemmy client for iOS and Android built with Flutter

item.title: simolus3/drift
item.description: Drift is an easy to use, reactive, typesafe persistence library for Dart & Flutter.

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Actively maintained, community-driven chat UI implementation with an optional Firebase BaaS.

item.title: jama5262/jiffy
item.description: Jiffy is a Flutter (Android, IOS and Web) date time package for parsing, manipulating, querying and formatting dates

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/flutter_chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (kdbx 3.x) compatible.

item.title: jpnurmi/awesome-flutter-linux
item.description: A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects.

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.

item.title: bluefireteam/audioplayers
item.description: A Flutter package to play multiple audio files simultaneously (Android/iOS/web/Linux/Windows/macOS)

item.title: subosito/flutter-action
item.description: Flutter environment for use in GitHub Actions. It works on Linux, Windows, and macOS.

item.title: azkadev/whisper
item.description: Whisper Dart is a cross platform library for dart and flutter that allows converting audio to text / speech to text / inference from Open AI models

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: YehudaKremer/msix
item.description: Create Msix installer for flutter windows-build files.

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: krishnakumarcn/faded
item.description: Client did not pay? Add opacity to widgets and decrease it every day until their app completely fades away. Set a due date and customize the number of days you offer them until the app is fully vanished.

item.title: marioreggiori/objectdb
item.description: Persistent embedded document-oriented NoSQL database for Dart and Flutter.

item.title: arran4/flutter_google_datastore
item.description: Google Datastore and Datastore emulator client for “easy” modification of values
